name: send_money_turn
description: Advance one conversational turn of the UNIGOX send-money flow. Reuse the same session_key across turns so recipient resolution, auth, KYC, quotes, and settlement state continue correctly.

text.description: The latest user message for the send-money flow, including follow-ups like recipient names, amounts, yes/no confirmations, payout details, KYC details, or receipt confirmations.

session_key.description: A stable per-chat or per-user conversation key. Reuse the same value across turns so the transfer session resumes instead of restarting.

reset.description: When true, ignore any saved session state for this session_key and start a fresh send-money flow.
